combined_text: Can I Contribute to a SEP IRA and 401 (k)? "Home » Retirement Can I Contribute to a SEP IRA and 401 (k)?by Bonnie Conrad; Updated July 27, 2017A 401 (k) plan and a SEP-IRA are both ways to save for retirement while saving on current taxes.
